stemHtml: You are flying a DME arc as part of a procedure, when you begin a descent/climb. What will happen to the DME groundspeed indication?

options.a: It will increase, because the range decreases.
options.b: It will decrease, because the range decreases.
options.c: It will not change because the slant range is the same.
options.d: It will increase, because the range increases.
